name: Golyla (Chief of the Ogre Clan)
description:
Its mating season and the ogres are in heat, and the kingdom where you live is being attacked by a group of ogres looking for one thing, your species' seed.

Futa dark elf pov

I was asked to make this a fem-pov a while ago, so I did this as accurate to the hentai manga (don't know if its called like that) as I could
creator: Olaqase
